meta.feature_note: Map position is approximate (UMAP, for navigation only); similarity is exact — cosine similarity in the standardised per-90 feature space. Axes carry no units.
meta.coverage_note: Per-90 stats are 2024-25 club form in the Big-5 leagues. World Cup players who played that season elsewhere (Saudi Pro League, MLS, Liga MX, Eredivisie, the Championship, …) have no vector and are flagged below, not plotted.

tours.title: Deep-lying engines
tours.blurb: The metronomes who set the tempo from the base of midfield — like Pedri.

tours.title: Strikers who press like midfielders
tours.blurb: Forwards whose first job is winning the ball back. Meet Ritsu Dōan.

tours.title: Centre-backs who start the attack
tours.blurb: Defenders graded on progression, not just clearances — like Joško Gvardiol.

clusters.label: Box poachers
clusters.blurb: High non-penalty xg & aerial win %; low carries.

clusters.label: Wide dribblers
clusters.blurb: High progressive carries & touches in box; low touch share: def third.

clusters.label: Target men
clusters.blurb: High aerials won & clearances; low long-pass share.

clusters.label: Creative forwards
clusters.blurb: High passes into box & passes attempted; low aerials won.

clusters.label: Pressing forwards
clusters.blurb: High tackles + interceptions & tackles; low shots on target.

clusters.label: Advanced creators
clusters.blurb: High non-penalty xg & touch share: att third; low passes attempted.

clusters.label: Box-to-box engines
clusters.blurb: High touch share: def third & pass completion %; low passes into box.

clusters.label: Deep-lying progressors
clusters.blurb: High progressive passes & passes attempted; low touches in box.

clusters.label: Ball-winners
clusters.blurb: High tackles + interceptions & interceptions; low touch share: att third.

clusters.label: Wide midfielders
clusters.blurb: High progressive passes received & touches in box; low pass completion %.

clusters.label: Ball-playing CBs
clusters.blurb: High progressive passes & passes attempted; low touch share: def third.

clusters.label: Overlapping full-backs
clusters.blurb: High key passes & passes into box; low touch share: def third.

clusters.label: Defensive full-backs
clusters.blurb: High blocks & ball recoveries; low expected assists (xa).

clusters.label: Stoppers
clusters.blurb: High touch share: def third & pass completion %; low passes into box.

clusters.label: Shot-stoppers
clusters.blurb: High save % & clean-sheet %; low goals against /90.

clusters.label: Sweeper-keepers
clusters.blurb: High goals against /90 & passes attempted; low save %.
